---
title: "Pi Day Part 1"
image: ../img/piday1.png
categories:
    - Javascript
    - Math
    - Geometry
    - Middle School
    - Intro HS
    - Pi day
aliases:
  - /piday
---

Calculate the digits of pi with a random number generator and some code!

## Links to Activity

* [Instructions for Pi Day Part 1](https://www.asc.ohio-state.edu/orban.14/math_coding/pi_graphical3/index.html)
* [Pi Day Part 1 Code Editor](https://editor.p5js.org/chris.m.orban/sketches/8-Lv1T5y_)

## Pi Day Part 1 Playlist

[Pi Day Part 1 Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLISRe8GegO8TbpZK2qvOi6y0kphRI-3xw)

[![](../img/pi_day_video.jpg)](https://youtu.be/9MHsjqrCGqY?si=JiQGCbPJZHQ1R23f)
